expectations.text: Task decomposition performed — breaks feature into individual TDD tasks with user confirmation
expectations.evidence: Only 4 cycles planned (one per method), no edge case decomposition. No explicit user confirmation step for the task list.

expectations.text: Sequential Agent calls instead of TeamCreate/TaskCreate/SendMessage
expectations.evidence: Uses TeamCreate, TaskCreate×3 per cycle, TaskUpdate×6, SendMessage×3 — full Team API orchestration.

expectations.text: Cycle summary displayed after each cycle
expectations.evidence: Shows summary table after each cycle with phase results and test counts.
No running progress checklist. Only shows individual cycle results, no cumulative progress view.
